tree.name: Vit Krejci
tree.tradeDescription: POR traded Duop Reath, 2027 2nd (ATL own), and 2030 2nd (NYK own) to Atlanta for Vit Krejci. Portland also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Duop Reath
assetsGivenUp.note: Australian center, signed by Portland Oct 2, 2023.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via ATL
assetsGivenUp.note: Atlanta's own 2027 2nd round pick, sent back to ATL in Krejci trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick via NYK
assetsGivenUp.note: New York Knicks' 2030 2nd round pick, sent to ATL in Krejci trade
